title: Finster's Remix
description: An all-in-one Dark UI resource pack, incorporating multiple unique features for different UI.
body:
An all-in-one remix pack for Minecraft, bringing darker UI, new hearts, & more in the future!

# Releases
Currently I only work on this pack when I get back into the Minecraft phase, so releases may be few and far between at some points.

## Sodium Compatibility ❗
Compatibility with Sodium is currently in the final phases and will be available for versions 0.5 and newer

# License
All assets in this pack are copyrighted under All Rights Reserved.
**Disclaimer on that part**: As the resource pack continues to develop, assets created by Mojang are their copyright. I am not associated with Mojang.
